zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen於1022年10月10日出生在法國諾門迪艾波奧蒙吉萊-洛格時，他的父親Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer43歲，母親Albreda Haye38歲。他於大約1045年與Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1094年11月29日享年72歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利普雷奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen于1022年10月10日出生在法国諾門迪艾波奧蒙吉萊-洛格时，他的父亲Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer43岁，母亲Albreda Haye38岁。他于大约1045年与Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于1094年11月29日享年72岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利普雷奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Bright’.

nameMeanings.name: Barbu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: descriptive nickname from barbu ‘bearded’.
Romanian: from the old personal name Barbu of uncertain origin, usually thought to be a male derivative of the female name Barbura, an old vernacular form of Latin Barbara .

variants.name: Barbara
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen was born on 10 October 1022, in Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer, was 43 and his mother, Albreda Haye, was 38. He married Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan about 1045. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1066. He died on 29 November 1094, at the age of 72, and was buried in Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen est né le 10 octobre 1022, à Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Albreda Haye, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan environ 1045. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé le 29 novembre 1094, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen am 10. Oktober 1022 in Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer 43 und seine Mutter Albreda Haye 38. Er hat um 1045 Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 29. November 1094 im Alter von 72 Jahren und wurde in Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen è nato il il 10 ottobre 1022 nel Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Albreda Haye, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan circa 1045. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì il 29 novembre 1094, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouenが1022年10月10日にフランスノーマンディエウアビーウモント-レ-ロジャーで生まれた時，父Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemerは43歳，母Albreda Hayeは38歳であった。約1045年にAdeline or Adeliza de Meulanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1094年11月29日に72歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメプルeアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen(이)가 1022년 10월 10일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 보몽-레-로거에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda Haye(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1045년 Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1094년 11월 29일 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 플e오스에 묻혔다.

mn.10 October 1022–29 NOV 1094: 1022 оны Аравдугаар сарын 10–1094 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 29

pt.10 October 1022–29 NOV 1094: 10 de outubro de 1022–29 de novembro de 1094
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen nasceu em 10 de outubro de 1022, em Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Haye, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan aproximadamente 1045. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1094, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen родился 10 октября 1022 г. в местности бомонт-ле-рогир, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Albreda Haye, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan около 1045 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 29 ноября 1094 г. в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности прeаукс, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.10 October 1022–29 NOV 1094: 10 de octubre de 1022–29 de noviembre de 1094
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen nació el 10 de octubre de 1022, en Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Albreda Haye, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan aproximadamente 1045. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1094, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
